title: jurinea polycephala
intro: Jurinea polycephala, also known as Kuan-don, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Jurinea polycephala has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and anti-oxidative properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight against free radicals in the body. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, Jurinea polycephala is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and relieve symptoms of various ailments.
